# DevOps Engineer

## Overview
We are looking for a DevOps Engineer to improve our infrastructure reliability, CI/CD pipelines, and cloud automation. You will work closely with backend teams to ensure scalable, secure deployments.

## Responsibilities
- Build and maintain CI/CD pipelines
- Automate infrastructure provisioning (IaC)
- Monitor systems and improve observability
- Improve deployment reliability and incident response

## Requirements (Must-have)
- Linux administration
- CI/CD (GitHub Actions or GitLab CI)
- Infrastructure as Code (Terraform or CloudFormation)
- Containerization (Docker)
- Monitoring and alerting (Prometheus, Grafana, or similar)

## Nice-to-have
- Kubernetes
- AWS or Azure
- SRE practices
- Security hardening
- Python or Bash scripting

## Seniority
Mid/Senior

## Domain
devops
